name: Spray Bottle 1L
desc: Trigger misting bottle for neem oil, foliar feeds, leaf cleaning

name: Yellow Sticky Traps (20-pack)
desc: Catches whiteflies, aphids, leaf-miners · also a monitoring tool
how: Hang at canopy height. Replace when covered.

name: Pheromone Trap + Lure (Fruit Fly)
desc: Species-specific lure traps male fruit flies · prevents mango/guava/cucurbit damage
how: Hang 1 trap per 25 m². Refill lure every 30 days.

name: Battery Sprayer 5 L (Rechargeable)
desc: USB-rechargeable knapsack sprayer · adjustable nozzle · for neem, panchagavya, foliar feeds
how: Charge full before use. Rinse tank after use.

name: Manual Pump Sprayer 2 L
desc: Pre-compression sprayer for neem oil, jeevamrit foliar · brass nozzle
how: Release pressure after spraying. Rinse with water.
